type.description: The type of security profile. Possible values are: `THREAT_PREVENTION`, `CUSTOM_MIRRORING`, `CUSTOM_INTERCEPT`.

name.description: The name of the security profile resource.

description.description: An optional description of the security profile. The Max length is 512 characters.

labels.description: A map of key/value label pairs to assign to the resource. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

threat_prevention_profile.description: The threat prevention configuration for the security profile. Structure is [documented below](#nested_threat_prevention_profile).

severity_overrides.description: The configuration for overriding threats actions by severity match. Structure is [documented below](#nested_threat_prevention_profile_severity_overrides).

threat_overrides.description: The configuration for overriding threats actions by threat id match. If a threat is matched both by configuration provided in severity overrides and threat overrides, the threat overrides action is applied. Structure is [documented below](#nested_threat_prevention_profile_threat_overrides).

antivirus_overrides.description: Defines what action to take for antivirus threats per protocol. Structure is [documented below](#nested_threat_prevention_profile_antivirus_overrides).

custom_mirroring_profile.description: The configuration for defining the Mirroring Endpoint Group used to mirror traffic to third-party collectors. Structure is [documented below](#nested_custom_mirroring_profile).

mirroring_endpoint_group.description: The Mirroring Endpoint Group to which matching traffic should be mirrored. Format: projects/{project_id}/locations/global/mirroringEndpointGroups/{endpoint_group_id}

custom_intercept_profile.description: The configuration for defining the Intercept Endpoint Group used to intercept traffic to third-party firewall appliances. Structure is [documented below](#nested_custom_intercept_profile).

intercept_endpoint_group.description: The Intercept Endpoint Group to which matching traffic should be intercepted. Format: projects/{project_id}/locations/global/interceptEndpointGroups/{endpoint_group_id}

location.description: The location of the security profile. The default value is `global`.

parent.description: The name of the parent this security profile belongs to. Format: organizations/{organization_id}.

action.description: Threat action override. Possible values are: `ALERT`, `ALLOW`, `DEFAULT_ACTION`, `DENY`.

severity.description: Severity level to match. Possible values are: `CRITICAL`, `HIGH`, `INFORMATIONAL`, `LOW`, `MEDIUM`.

threat_id.description: Vendor-specific ID of a threat to override.

protocol.description: Required protocol to match. Possible values are: `SMTP`, `SMB`, `POP3`, `IMAP`, `HTTP2`, `HTTP`, `FTP`.

action.description: Threat action override. For some threat types, only a subset of actions applies. Possible values are: `ALERT`, `ALLOW`, `DEFAULT_ACTION`, `DENY`.
